lines: Watch out, the slime is sticky!
Careful, that chest might be a mimic.
The goblin shouted, "Run for your life!"
Well, that didn't go as planned.
The dragon's tail knocked over three barrels.
Wait, did you hear that noise?
The knight's armor rattled with every step.
Yikes, this cave smells like old socks.
Grab the torch, quick, before it goes out!
Nice shot! That goblin never saw it coming.
The bridge creaked, groaned, and held anyway.
The chest was locked, of course.
Careful now, the floor's not all there.
Well done, adventurer. That's one down.
